_description: Dirty Page tracking for Android-SW-Owner Skill Set. A 'dirty' skill requires content refresh due to AOSP version changes or path structure updates.
_research_note: 2026-04-11: Incremental research session. Six skills remain dirty for A16. Updated HS-038 (IOCTL SoC-specific allowlist detail) and HS-039 (Bluetooth bond loss intents, LE Audio Sharing, CDM removeBond). AOSP A16 source expected April 2026 (Q2 drop). No new GKI 6.12 errata. Prior notes HS-023..HS-041 valid.

L2-build-system-expert._steward_note: A15: sandboxed genrules, Python 2 removed, sysprop ref change, depfile removal, module name validation. See HS-031.

L2-security-selinux-expert._steward_note: A16 delta: IOCTL hardening macro (QPR2), KeyMint 4.0 moduleHash attestation. See HS-038.

L2-hal-vendor-interface-expert._steward_note: A15: VNDK deprecated, AIDL mandatory for new HALs, Health HAL 3.0, Thermal HAL 2.0. See HS-031.

L2-framework-services-expert._steward_note: A15: FGS restrictions from BOOT_COMPLETED, mediaProcessing FGS type, soft restart deprecated. See HS-032.

L2-init-boot-sequence-expert._steward_note: A15: Virtual A/B v3, 16KB page size boot, soft restart deprecated. See HS-032.

L2-version-migration-expert._steward_note: A15: baseline updated; migration table verified. 16KB mandatory deadline May 2026.

L2-multimedia-audio-expert._steward_note: A16 delta: AudioHalCapConfiguration.aidl closes CAP gap, APV codec, AV1 transition, HDR enhancements. See HS-035, HS-041.

L2-connectivity-network-expert._steward_note: A16 delta: unified ranging module, AIS Bluetooth GATT, IMS API expansion, SoftAp disconnect callback. See HS-039.

L2-kernel-gki-expert._steward_note: A16 delta: GKI android16-6.12 (Linux 6.12 LTS, latest 6.12.69), KMI break from android15-6.6, 16KB page GKI on-demand builds. See HS-023, HS-033.

L2-bootloader-lk-expert._steward_note: Phase 5.2: Skill refreshed to v2.0.0 covering GBL (Android 16). GBL architecture, UEFI protocols, ESP partition layout, security model, source layout, build instructions all documented. References: gbl_boot_architecture.md. See HS-034, HS-040.

L2-trusted-firmware-atf-expert._steward_note: A16 delta: FF-A support changes pKVM↔TrustZone communication; Trusty OS in pVMs blurs ATF/pKVM boundary. See HS-037.

L2-virtualization-pkvm-expert._steward_note: A16 delta: LL-NDK, early boot VMs, FF-A, Ferrochrome, Microdroid 16K, Trusty in pVMs, device assignment promoted, hypervisor tracing. See HS-037.

L3-TEMPLATE._note: Template skill for L3 OEM/SoC extensions. Not a real skill — used as a copy source.
